steps.title: Identify the passage's progression
steps.content: The passage moves from broad to narrow: it opens with general scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects, then focuses on one specific research team's study, and finally presents one specific finding from that study.

steps.title: Match the three-part structure to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice captures all three parts: it notes the general scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects, describes a specific study related to that interest, and states one of the study's findings.

The other three choices either add information not in the passage, fail to capture the progression, or mischaracterize the text's content.

That matches D.
